title: Lelepet Dog Jumper Winter Pullover - Knitted Warm Turtleneck Christmas Sweater for Cold Weather, Soft Knitwear for Small Dogs Boys Girls, Pet Vest Outfit Cat Sweater, Blue, S
features: COZY MATERIAL: The dog turtleneck pullover is made of high-density acrylic yarn that is comfortable, soft, and warm. High elasticity makes your pet comfortable to wear and move freely, it's a must-have for winter, fall, and spring travel

SLEEVES & TURTLENECK DESIGN: This dog jumper with sleeves can cover your dog's neck, chest, and belly, effectively protecting them from the cold. In addition, our sweater offers a leash hole on the back for walking the dog. Perfect for daily wear and outdoor activities

CLASSIC PATTERN: Solid color cable knitwear features a classic cable pattern, cool for your dog's daily wear or holiday dressing. Our winter dog sweatshirts are available in multiple colors, suitable for male and female dogs

SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS OCCASIONS: This dog jumper is perfect for every winter adventure! Whether it's a birthday celebration, Valentine's Day, Halloween, Christmas party, or simply to keep your furry pet warm for everyday events

SIZE INFORMATION: This dog winter jumper is available in six sizes ranging from XS to 2XL, suitable for small, medium, and large dogs. Please measure your dog's chest and back length accurately before purchasing warm clothes
